ranks._comment: Rank requirement label pairs (HR1+, HR1~). Struct: 2 s32p + 12 bytes padding = 20 bytes.

pac._comment: mhfpac.bin string tables. Skills use pointer-pair mode; text_* tables use null-terminated grouped or count-based strided modes.

text_48._comment: Skill tree / decoration name pairs: fixed 423 entries, 2 s32p each (8 bytes per entry).

inf._comment: Quest data (mhfinf.bin). Multi-level category table with 8 text strings per quest.

nav._comment: Hunter Navi data (mhfnav.bin). Text fields not yet documented in ImHex patterns.

gao._comment: Felyne partner / companion data (mhfgao.bin). First-pass coverage: header-rooted null-terminated s32p tables. Additional sections (0x020/0x028/0x02C equipment description tables, 0x040 event dialogue) are reached via meta-tables at 0xC640-0xC680 and still need struct RE.

armor_helm._comment: Felyne head armor names (ネコヘルム). Uses fixed count because a 'YYYY/MM/DD' build-date ASCII string is stored between the table end and its 0 terminator, which would break null-terminated mode.

armor_mail._comment: Felyne body armor names (ネコメイル).

weapon_names._comment: Felyne weapon names. 257 fixed entries. First three are English fallbacks ('None', 'Cat Bone Pick', 'Cat Paw Punch') pointing into the English text region at 0x34000+.

armor_desc._comment: Felyne armor descriptions. Flat s32p array, 3 strings per description followed by a 0 terminator (4 ptrs per group). Row 0 is an English 'Nothing equipped.' fallback with only 1 non-null ptr.

weapon_desc._comment: Felyne weapon descriptions. Same layout as armor_desc (s32p groups of 4, 3 strings + 0 terminator per description).

dialogue_type_0._comment: Felyne partner dialogue template, personality type 0 (40 lines, enthusiastic/cat-fighter).

dialogue_type_1._comment: Felyne partner dialogue template, personality type 1 (40 lines, humble/grateful).

dialogue_type_2._comment: Felyne partner dialogue template, personality type 2 (40 lines, timid/anxious).

dialogue_type_3._comment: Felyne partner dialogue template, personality type 3 (40 lines, aloof/self-reliant).

dialogue_type_4._comment: Felyne partner dialogue template, personality type 4 (40 lines, earnest/trainee).

dialogue_type_5._comment: Felyne partner dialogue template, personality type 5 (40 lines, polite/respectful).

dialogue_type_6._comment: Felyne partner dialogue template, personality type 6 (40 lines, cheerful/spirited).

dialogue_type_7._comment: Felyne partner dialogue template, personality type 7 (40 lines, cool/casual).

skill_text._comment: Felyne skill descriptions + English skill names. Flat s32p array of 238 entries at header 0x124 -> 0x13EC0: [0..1] English headers ('None', 'Disables wind pressure.'), [2..55] 54 Japanese skill effect descriptions (the previously orphan region at 0x13EC8 is reachable as entries [2..55] of this table), [56..237] 182 English skill name/description strings. End of array coincides with the start of the other slices at header 0x108/0x10c.

skill_names_zenith._comment: English Zenith/Myriad Felyne skill names (9 entries: Status Immunity, Status Immunity Myriad, No Stamin Depletion [Small/Large], Elemental Attack Up, Affinity Up [Small/Large], Divine Protection, Goddess' Embrace).

situational_dialogue._comment: Situational Felyne dialogue region at 0x21fe0..0x22880 (header 0x40 -> base, header 0x48 -> end). Mixed struct with 4-byte slots interleaved as: string pointers, mid-character substring references (runtime composition engine), numeric IDs / bitfields, and padding. Extracted via scan_region mode which walks every 4-byte aligned slot and rejects pointers whose target's preceding byte is a Shift-JIS lead byte (mid-character). Substring references remain in the file and continue to resolve to the original Japanese bytes at runtime (worst-case visual: partial replay in JP while full line is translated).

sqd._comment: Squad / NPC partner data (mhfsqd.bin). Greenfield RE: the file header at 0x00-0x38 stores 15 u32 pointers that delimit struct-strided tables in the data region, with a flat Shift-JIS string blob at 0x40-0x14C0. String pointers are embedded as fields within structs (not s32p arrays). First-pass coverage: 6 header-rooted struct-strided tables (~190 strings). Tables at 0x00/0x04/0x08/0x0C/0x1C/0x20/0x2C/0x30/0x34/0x38 are non-string / complex and not yet extracted.

npc_names._comment: NPC partner names (Aaron, Bart, Calvin, Tania, ...). 43 entries, stride 8, string ptr at field 0. End matches header 0x20 (0x1B58).

star_rank._comment: Star rank labels (one/two/three stars). 3 entries, stride 8, field 0. End matches header 0x20 (0x1B58).

skill_activation._comment: Squad skill activation messages ('Skill X activates.'). 35 entries, stride 16, string ptr at field 8. End matches header 0x14 (0x1DC0).

skill_description._comment: Squad skill descriptions. 26 entries, stride 12, string ptr at field 4. End matches header 0x10 (0x1F00).

skill_quest_label._comment: Skill quest-count labels ('Usable 5 times per quest', ...). 80 entries, stride 12, string ptr at field 4. End matches header 0x0C (0x22C0).

header_labels._comment: Header / placeholder labels (point suppression, point reset). 3 entries, stride 12, string ptr at field 4. End matches header 0x34 (0x1510) — but layout is irregular; only field 4 is reliably a string across all rows. First entry is a placeholder '1234567890'.

rcc._comment: Reception / event info strings (mhfrcc.bin). First-pass coverage: the English event-info pointer table at 0x580 is clean (7 entries). Japanese equivalents live in a variable-length struct region near 0x5c0 mixed with numeric fields and are not yet fully mapped.

events_en._comment: English event info strings referenced by a contiguous 7-entry s32p table pointed to by u32 at file offset 0x08.

events_full._comment: Event info multi-field struct table at 0x5c0 (7 rows x 36-byte stride). Header u32 at 0x00 = 0x5c0 (base), header u32 at 0x04 = 7 (count). Each row carries up to 4 string pointer fields at +0x14 (title), +0x18 (description/alt title), +0x1C / +0x20 (usually '−' placeholders but row 1 stores 'Guild Conquest is underway!' and a '残り時間…' template). Supersets events_en (row.+0x14 == events_en entries).

msx._comment: Mezeporta Festa item/effect strings (mhfmsx.bin). First-pass coverage: a 17-entry struct-strided table at literal file offset 0x2abc containing (name_ptr, desc_ptr) pairs per 0x24-byte struct. Most slots are '----' placeholders; ~10 slots contain real item names and their effect descriptions.
